task_description: Build a full, production-ready Institute ERP system from scratch with role-based access for Admin, Trainer, Counsellor, and Student. Monorepo with Node.js/Express/TypeScript backend + React/Vite/TypeScript frontend. Features: JWT auth, RBAC, hybrid attendance (QR + online), evaluation system, mock interviews, fee management, reporting with PDF/Excel export, Docker containerization.

verification.summary: All verification passes. Backend: tsc compiles cleanly, 48 integration tests pass (auth, admin CRUD, trainer, attendance with QR token validation). Frontend: vite build succeeds (838 modules), 6 component tests pass. Docker: multi-stage image builds successfully. Tests exercise real code paths through actual HTTP endpoints and would fail if implementation were reverted.
